body:
## Purpose 
- Updates evaporation to be less dependent on resolution in the vertical (note: results look worse now)
- ameliorates resolution dep by linearly interpolating to the surface (not efficient as written/allocates a lot)
- Adds two tutorials which make plots included in the paper (moved one from experiments/)
- moves get_deltaz to Domains, as the linear_interpolation_to_surface needs it

## To-do



## Content

title: Paper plots
